capability_questions.capability_name: Service Exists and in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a Risk Management service ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise risk management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Existence of an enterprise risk management service

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise use a risk management platform to monitor and visualize risk ?
questions.intent: Evaluate use of a risk management platform to monitor and visualize risk
questions.evaluation_focus: Platform used to monitor and visualize risk

questions.prompt: Does the scope of the risk management platform cover the entire enterprise and its managed entities or does it cover a smaller scope?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the risk management platform scope is enterprise-wide or limited

questions.prompt: Does the platform have capability to automate the risk calculation and management ?
questions.intent: Evaluate platform automation for risk calculation and management
questions.evaluation_focus: Automation of risk calculation and management

questions.prompt: Can the platform integrate with other managment platforms to share risk information ?
questions.intent: Evaluate platform integration with other management platforms to share risk information

questions.prompt: Is there a formal Risk management process documented ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal risk management process is documented

questions.prompt: Is the Risk management process implemented enterprise wide for all relevant risks?
questions.intent: Evaluate enterprise-wide implementation of the risk management process

questions.prompt: Does the Risk Management platform , or the risk management team automate risk management process ?
questions.intent: Evaluate automation of the risk management process by platform or team
questions.evaluation_focus: Process automation via platform or team

questions.prompt: How many times are the risk management process reviewed ?
questions.intent: Evaluate how frequently the risk management process is reviewed

capability_questions.capability_name: Risk Register and Risk Exception Process

questions.prompt: Are there scnearios when the proper risk cannot be mitigated and the risk needs to be accepted ? If yes how are risk exceptions handled ?
questions.intent: Evaluate risk exception handling when mitigation is not possible

questions.prompt: is there a documented enterprise wide policy on how risk exceptions are recorded ?
questions.intent: Evaluate documented enterprise-wide policy for recording risk exceptions

questions.prompt: Does the risk management platform automated risk exception ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the risk management platform automates risk exceptions

questions.prompt: Is the risk register reviewed frequentlty once exceptions are generated ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the risk register is reviewed frequently after exceptions are generated

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented enterprise risk management program and strategy ?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented enterprise risk management program and strategy
questions.evaluation_focus: Formal documented ERM program and strategy

questions.prompt: Is the Risk management strategy reviewed frequently ?
questions.intent: Evaluate how frequently the risk management strategy is reviewed

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an Enterprise risk management team that manages and governs the enterprise risk management process and program ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a dedicated enterprise risk management team governs process and program
questions.evaluation_focus: Dedicated ERM team governing process and program

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a Cybersecurity Risk Manager to lead the Risk management initiative?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a Cybersecurity Risk Manager leads the risk management initiative
questions.evaluation_focus: Cybersecurity Risk Manager role leading the initiative

questions.prompt: As part of risk management strategy , is the risk management team capable of evaluating and designing enterprise scale risk scale( 0 to 10, 0 to 100 etc. HML, VH, H, M L VL etc ) to be consumed to create risk based policies ?
questions.intent: Evaluate ability to design enterprise risk scales for risk-based policies
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise risk scale design for policy use

questions.prompt: Are the risk scales reviewed frequently with addition of people process and technology and overall maturation of enterprise ?
questions.intent: Evaluate frequent review of risk scales as the enterprise matures
questions.evaluation_focus: Risk scale review as the enterprise matures

capability_questions.capability_name: Overall Context based Risk score calculation for flows

questions.prompt: As part of risk quantification, does the enterprise derive a risk for each flow (subject and object combination ?)
questions.intent: Evaluate per-flow risk quantification for subject and object combinations

questions.prompt: Is the quantified risk same across all locations of the enterprise ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether quantified flow risk is consistent across enterprise locations

questions.prompt: Does the risk change dynamically when the risk of the flow changes ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether flow risk changes dynamically when flow risk changes

questions.prompt: Can this risk be utilized across various platforms as well as calculating flow risk score?
questions.intent: Evaluate reuse of flow risk across platforms and flow risk score calculation

capability_questions.capability_name: Subject Profile Risk calculation, assessment and monitoring

questions.prompt: As part of risk quantification, does the enterprise derive a risk for each subject that attempts access to enterprise assets ?
questions.intent: Evaluate per-subject risk quantification for access to enterprise assets

questions.prompt: Is the quantified risk same across all locations of the enterprise ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether quantified subject risk is consistent across enterprise locations

questions.prompt: Does the risk change dynamically when the risk of the subject changes ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether subject risk changes dynamically when subject risk changes

questions.prompt: Can this risk be utilized across various platforms as well as calculating flow risk score?
questions.intent: Evaluate reuse of subject risk across platforms and flow risk score calculation

capability_questions.capability_name: Device Risk calculation assessment and monitoring

questions.prompt: As part of risk quantification, does the enterprise derive a risk for each device that attempts access to enterprise assets ?
questions.intent: Evaluate per-device risk quantification for access to enterprise assets

questions.prompt: Is the quantified risk same across all locations of the enterprise ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether quantified device risk is consistent across enterprise locations

questions.prompt: Does the risk change dynamically when the risk of the device changes ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether device risk changes dynamically when device risk changes

questions.prompt: Can this risk be utilized across various platforms as well as calculating flow risk score?
questions.intent: Evaluate reuse of device risk across platforms and flow risk score calculation

capability_questions.capability_name: Object Profile Risk calculation assessment and monitoring

questions.prompt: As part of risk quantification, does the enterprise derive a risk for each object that attempts access to enterprise assets ?
questions.intent: Evaluate per-object risk quantification for access to enterprise assets

questions.prompt: Is the quantified risk same across all locations of the enterprise ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether quantified object risk is consistent across enterprise locations

questions.prompt: Does the risk change dynamically when the risk of the object changes ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether object risk changes dynamically when object risk changes

questions.prompt: Can this risk be utilized across various platforms as well as calculating flow risk score?
questions.intent: Evaluate reuse of object risk across platforms and flow risk score calculation

capability_questions.capability_name: Supply chain risk calculation assessment and monitoring

questions.prompt: As part of risk quantification, does the enterprise derive a risk for hardware and software of third party entities ?
questions.intent: Evaluate risk quantification for third-party hardware and software
questions.evaluation_focus: Third-party hardware and software risk quantification

questions.prompt: Is the quantified risk same across all locations of the enterprise ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether quantified supply chain risk is consistent across enterprise locations
questions.evaluation_focus: Supply chain risk consistency across locations

questions.prompt: Does the risk change dynamically when the risk of the third party changes ?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether supply chain risk changes dynamically when third-party risk changes

questions.prompt: Can this risk be utilized across various platforms as well as calculating flow risk score?
questions.intent: Evaluate reuse of supply chain risk across platforms and flow risk score calculation
questions.evaluation_focus: Supply chain risk reuse across platforms

capability_questions.capability_name: Changes in Risk profile logging and correlation

questions.prompt: Is there a formal documented process for transporting risk profile changes to the SOC ?
questions.intent: Evaluate formal documented process for transporting risk profile changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented process for risk profile changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Is transport of risk changes made securely to the SOC ?
questions.intent: Evaluate secure transport of risk changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Secure transport of risk changes to the SOC

questions.prompt: Are dynamic changes to the risk captured and transferred to the SOC ?
questions.intent: Evaluate capture and transfer of dynamic risk changes to the SOC
questions.evaluation_focus: Dynamic risk changes captured and transferred to the SOC
